day5_ending_true_2.name: Me
day5_ending_true_2.text: *Sitting on a plastic chair under fluorescent lights. Yuna is beside me. We're both wrapped in blankets. Both soaking wet.*

day5_ending_true_3.name: Me
day5_ending_true_3.text: *A police officer is listening to us. Their eyes were skeptical at first. I showed them the photos on my phone. Handed over Yuna's memory card. Explained Seolhwa's records.*

day5_ending_true_5.name: Me
day5_ending_true_5.text: *Hours later. The police sealed off the school. Special vehicles passed through the school gate. The underground lab was discovered. Medical equipment. Drugs. Subject records.*

day5_ending_true_7.name: Me
day5_ending_true_7.text: *The news is reporting it every day. 'School Laboratory Scandal.' 'Memory Manipulation Experiments on Transfer Students.' 'Entire Board of Directors Arrested.'*

day5_ending_true_8.name: Me
day5_ending_true_8.text: *The scene of Ms. Eunsu being arrested appeared on TV. The teacher was... smiling. In front of the cameras too. Until the very end. Nurse Riin apparently turned herself in. She personally submitted the evidence.*

day5_ending_true_10.name: Me
day5_ending_true_10.text: *I came to the hill overlooking the school. Together with Yuna. The school has been closed. Yellow tape is wrapped around the school gate. The students were transferred to other schools.*

day5_ending_true_12.name: Me
day5_ending_true_12.text: *Yuna is holding a camera. A new camera.*

day5_ending_true_14.name: Me
day5_ending_true_14.text: *Yuna is smiling. A real smile I've never seen before. Her eyes are smiling. A smile that doesn't hide behind a camera.*

day5_ending_true_15.name: Me
day5_ending_true_15.text: *The whereabouts of the missing transfer students are being revealed. Some were found in other facilities. They say their memories are coming back.*

day5_ending_true_16.name: Me
day5_ending_true_16.text: *Sea is... in the hospital. Apparently receiving counseling. A child who had been 'educated' at this school since childhood. A child who was both a watcher and a victim. ...I have to go visit her someday. Not yet, but someday.*

day5_ending_true_17.name: Me
day5_ending_true_17.text: *The wind blows. The grass on the hill sways. And then — in the wind — a single cherry blossom petal came floating. A cherry blossom petal with no known origin. I took out the cherry blossom petal I'd picked up on Day 4 from my pocket. Let it go in the wind.*

day5_ending_true_20.name: Me
day5_ending_true_20.text: *The cherry blossom petal rides the wind and rises high into the sky. Into the light. Seolhwa has finally graduated from this cruel classroom. The soul that had been bound for a year... finally.*

day5_ending_true_21.name: Me
day5_ending_true_21.text: *The smell of rain, the smell of wet earth, and a cold wind. No smell of disinfectant, no sweet air freshener. All these rough and unpleasant sensations... were proof that I was alive in the real world.*

day5_ending_true_25.name: Me
day5_ending_true_25.text: *Yuna stands beside me and looks at the setting sun. She didn't wipe her tears. Neither did I. The rain stopped. Sunlight comes down through the clouds. Wind carrying the rain blows. It's warm.*

day5_ending_true_subtitle.text: Graduation — From the classroom that never graduated, at last.

day5_postcredit_2.name: Me
day5_postcredit_2.text: *A large office. A desk piled with documents. Multiple monitors. A school floor plan is displayed on the screen.*

day5_postcredit_3.text: "Yes. ...Confirmed. We'll proceed with shutting down that site. Asset recovery is complete, and personnel will be reassigned."

day5_postcredit_4.text: "The media is making noise over Subject #13's case, but per standard procedure we'll cover it as an individual's misconduct at the on-site supervisor level. Destroy all links to the foundation."

day5_postcredit_5.text: "...Yes. Selection of the next pilot school is complete."

day5_postcredit_6.text: "Has the proposal for staff reassignment been submitted?"

day5_postcredit_7.name: Me
day5_postcredit_7.text: *The monitor screen changes. Photos of a new school. New uniforms. New names. The file title is visible. 'Non-Adaptive Student Correction Program — Year 2 Implementation Plan.'*

day5_postcredit_8.name: Me
day5_postcredit_8.text: *...A new transfer student profile appears on the screen. The student in the photo is smiling. A face that doesn't know anything.*

day5_ending_escape_2.name: Me
day5_ending_escape_2.text: *The school is behind me now. Only streetlights shine in a row through the darkness.*

day5_ending_escape_3.name: Me
day5_ending_escape_3.text: *I called the police on my phone. Sent the evidence. Photos. Documents. Location.*

day5_ending_escape_4.name: Me
day5_ending_escape_4.text: *The police should be moving. ...I want to believe that.*

day5_ending_escape_6.name: Me
day5_ending_escape_6.text: *Yuna's face from the basement comes to mind. Her pale face. An arm dotted with injection marks. The trembling voice that called me 'senpai.'*

day5_ending_escape_8.name: Me
day5_ending_escape_8.text: *This guilt... I have to carry it for the rest of my life. It won't be washed away by the rain.*

day5_ending_escape_9.name: Me
day5_ending_escape_9.text: *I stopped walking and looked up at the sky. Rainwater pours down over my face. Cold.*

day5_ending_escape_10.name: Me
day5_ending_escape_10.text: *I survived. I survived. Is that alone... enough? ...It's not enough. But I survived. Because I survived, there are things I can still do.*

day5_ending_escape_11.name: Me
day5_ending_escape_11.text: *I started walking again. Into the rain.*

day5_ending_escape_subtitle.text: Survivor — The weight of one who lived.

day5_ending_resist_2.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_2.text: *Grass. Dew-soaked grass. The light of dawn.*

day5_ending_resist_3.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_3.text: *I lifted my body. This is... the hill behind the school. How did I get here?*

day5_ending_resist_4.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_4.text: *My memory is broken. In the basement... the power went out... and someone took my hand and guided me through the darkness. A transparent hand. Cold but firm. ...Seolhwa.*

day5_ending_resist_5.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_5.text: *The school is visible below. Wrapped in mist. Unrealistically. Like a dream. ...It's not a dream. I really got out.*

day5_ending_resist_6.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_6.text: *Light shifts beside me. Seolhwa is standing there. Translucent in the dawn light. ...She's smiling. A smile that isn't sad. An expression I've never seen before.*

day5_ending_resist_8.name: Lee Seolhwa
day5_ending_resist_8.text: "Don't end up like me. Go back... and live."

day5_ending_resist_9.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_9.text: *Seolhwa's body begins to melt into the dawn light. From the edges. Sparkling.*

day5_ending_resist_11.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_11.text: *Seolhwa's form completely melts into the morning light and disappears. A single cherry blossom petal remained. It trembles in the wind... then flies away. ...Thank you.*

day5_ending_resist_12.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_12.text: *It's not over yet. Yuna is still there. I have the evidence. It has to come to light. I started descending the hill behind the school. Dawn is breaking. The path is visible.*

day5_ending_resist_subtitle.text: Incomplete Escape — It's not over yet.

day5_ending_cage_4.name: Me
day5_ending_cage_4.text: *The teacher smiles. A warm smile. I sit down at my seat. I open the textbook. Sea is sitting beside me. From behind, Nurse Riin hands over a cup of tea.*

day5_ending_cage_5.name: Me
day5_ending_cage_5.text: *The same morning. The same classroom. The same lessons.*

day5_ending_cage_6.name: Me
day5_ending_cage_6.text: *...I've lost count of how many mornings this has been. Yesterday was the same. The day before too. Three days ago, a week ago, a month ago... all the same day.*

day5_ending_cage_7.name: Me
day5_ending_cage_7.text: *Ms. Eunsu smiles. Sea smiles. Riin smiles. Everyone smiles. I smile too.*

day5_ending_cage_8.name: Me
day5_ending_cage_8.text: *...Naturally. My lip corners go up without any effort. I think this used to scare me once... when did it stop being scary?*

day5_ending_cage_9.name: Han Sea
day5_ending_cage_9.text: "{name}, I made octopus sausages again today."

day5_ending_cage_10.name: Me
day5_ending_cage_10.text: *It tastes good. It tastes good every day. After school. The student council room. Eating snacks with Sea and laughing. I can't remember what we talked about but... we laughed.*

day5_ending_cage_11.name: Me
day5_ending_cage_11.text: *Night. I fall asleep. No dreams. Morning. Eyes open.*

day5_ending_cage_15.name: Me
day5_ending_cage_15.text: *Something is missing. There's a hole in my memory. I feel like I've forgotten something. Something important. ...Someone's name. A transparent hand. A cherry blossom petal. The words 'run away.' ...What was it?*

day5_ending_cage_16.name: Me
day5_ending_cage_16.text: *My head hurts when I try to think about it. Let it go. Don't think about it. It's safe here. Because the teacher is protecting me. ...I smile too. The same smile. At the same angle.*

day5_ending_forget_4.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_4.text: *...It's warm. Inside a blanket. I can feel light. Sunlight is coming in through the curtains.*

day5_ending_forget_5.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_5.text: *...An alarm goes off. Beep beep beep. Beep beep beep.*

day5_ending_forget_6.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_6.text: *I opened my eyes. I see the ceiling. An unfamiliar ceiling. ...No, it's not unfamiliar. It's my room.*

day5_ending_forget_8.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_8.text: *I got up. I stretch. Cherry blossoms are visible through the window. Beautiful.*

day5_ending_forget_9.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_9.text: *Today is... my first day of transfer.*

day5_ending_forget_10.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_10.text: *A new school. A new class. New friends. My heart is fluttering. A little nervous, but... also excited. What kind of people will there be?*

day5_ending_forget_11.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_11.text: *I put on my uniform. I look in the mirror.*

day5_ending_forget_12.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_12.text: *For some reason... tears are flowing. Why am I crying? I'm not sad. Nothing is sad.*

day5_ending_forget_13.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_13.text: *I wiped the tears. Strange. Why did I cry. ...Must just be how I'm feeling. Nervous because it's the first day.*

day5_ending_forget_14.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_14.text: *I picked up my phone. No names in the contacts. An empty contact list. ...Was it always like this? What about friends from my old school? ...Where was my old school? ...I can't remember. It's fine. I'll make new friends.*

day5_ending_forget_15.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_15.text: *I opened the front door. Cherry blossom petals come drifting in. Beautiful. ...Why does my chest ache when I see cherry blossom petals?*

day5_ending_forget_16.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_16.text: *...I thought I heard something. Just my imagination. Let's go to school.*

day5_ending_forget_sea_max.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_sea_max.text: *A girl is standing in front of the school gate. A bright smile. A class president armband.*

day5_ending_forget_sea_max_2.name: Han Sea
day5_ending_forget_sea_max_2.text: "Hi! You're the student who transferred today, right? I'll show you around."

day5_ending_forget_sea_max_3.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_sea_max_3.text: *...This person, I feel like I've seen them somewhere. Where was it? ...I can't remember.*

day5_ending_ghost_3.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_3.text: *The school. ...Right. The school. The school I attended.*

day5_ending_ghost_4.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_4.text: *I'm standing in the corridor. The fluorescent lights glow faintly. The red light of the emergency lights.*

day5_ending_ghost_5.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_5.text: *I looked down at my feet. ...My feet aren't touching the floor. Ever so slightly. Floating.*

day5_ending_ghost_6.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_6.text: *I raised my hand. Lifted it. ...It's transparent. Through the spaces between my fingers, the corridor tiles are visible.*

day5_ending_ghost_7.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_7.text: *I've become like Seolhwa. I am... a being bound to this school.*

day5_ending_ghost_8.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_8.text: *I tried walking. No footsteps sound. I pass by classrooms. Students are sitting inside. Studying. Nobody looks at me.*

day5_ending_ghost_9.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_9.text: *A student passes through me. Their arm went through my body. No sensation. ...Can't be seen. Can't be heard. Can't be touched.*

day5_ending_ghost_10.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_10.text: *My name. What was my name? ...I can't remember. It will have been erased from the attendance sheet. Like Seolhwa. Time passes. I don't know how much. Seasons change. Cherry blossoms bloom and fall.*

day5_ending_ghost_12.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_12.text: *The classroom door opens, and an unfamiliar face walks in. A tense expression. Excited eyes. ...I was like that at first too.*

day5_ending_ghost_13.text: "Hello! Starting today I'm transferring to this school..."

day5_ending_ghost_14.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_14.text: *Ms. Eunsu smiles and greets them. Sea waves a hand. Riin smiles from the nurse's office. The same pattern. The same smiles. The same trap.*

day5_ending_ghost_15.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_15.text: *...This time, I have to be the one to warn them. Like Seolhwa did for me. I approached the transfer student. Tried touching their shoulder with an invisible hand. They don't feel it.*

day5_ending_ghost_16.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_16.text: *I tried to engrave words in the dialogue box. Like Seolhwa did. As ghost text. ...It writes. Very small. Faintly.*

day5_ending_ghost_17.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_17.text: *The transfer student looked at the screen. Paused for a moment. ...And moved on. Didn't pay attention to it. ...Of course. I was the same way at first.*

day5_ending_ghost_18.name: Me
day5_ending_ghost_18.text: *But I'll keep going. Every day. Every moment. Until this child learns the truth. Like Seolhwa did for me. Like she didn't give up. ...I'm here. Unseen, but. Unable to graduate, but. From here, I'll keep on warning.*

day5_ending_ghost_subtitle.text: Remnant — Records of one who never graduated.
